name: lionagi
description: Daily-driver agent runtime with curated skill plugins for orchestration, research, memory, and development workflows

plugins.name: show
plugins.description: Orchestrate multi-step agent workflows with quality gates and isolated workspaces

plugins.name: play
plugins.description: Define and run reusable workflow templates (playbooks) that parameterize agent tasks

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Plan and run multi-agent pipelines: fan out to parallel workers or chain agents in dependency order

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Run structured research across multiple viewpoints using web search, codebase analysis, and synthesis

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Persist and recall project context — decisions, patterns, and facts — across sessions

plugins.name: devx
plugins.description: Development workflow skills: conventional commits, formatting, CI checks, PR creation, and session summaries (session-start/session-summarize planned)

mcp-bundle (TODO: skeleton only; re-list when agent skills land)
